texto: Once you are miserable you are miserable there's no getting out of misery even if you'll be succeeded to get out of it,once again it will hunt you down and conquer it will conquer your heart once again best way to deal with it is to enjoy it.
explicacao: Citação de Fahad Hassan sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Once you are miserable you are miserable there's no getting out of misery even if you'll be succe…” articula reflexao, misery, miserable em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
